cnbc.title: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

cnbc.title: AMD's stock soars 15% as data center growth pushes revenue and guidance past estimates
cnbc.summary: AMD's earnings report lands as investors rush into the stock on optimism that the AI boom is just getting started.

cnbc.title: Super Micro stock jumps 18% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
cnbc.summary: Super Micro pointed to progress in U.S. manufacturing in issuing a stronger-than-expected quarterly forecast.

cnbc.title: EV maker Lucid suspends production guidance amid incoming CEO's business review
cnbc.summary: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.

cnbc.title: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
cnbc.summary: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

cnbc.title: Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap as rally in memory stocks accelerates
cnbc.summary: Micron has emerged as one of the most valuable U.S. tech companies thanks to insatiable demand for memory that's needed in AI chips.

cnbc.title: OpenAI trial: Brockman rebuts Musk's take on startup's history, recounts secret work for Tesla
cnbc.summary: OpenAI President Greg Brockman concluded his testimony on Tuesday as the blockbuster trial between the AI startup and Elon Musk rolled into its second week.

cnbc.title: AMC to screen live concerts through Arena One partnership
cnbc.summary: More than 300 AMC locations in 89 markets across the U.S. will be programmed for live concert screenings. Tickets will range from $40 to $75.

cnbc.title: Iran doesn't have 'kamikaze dolphins,' Hegseth says. But marine mammals have a long history of military use
cnbc.summary: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.

cnbc.title: Data suggests 'hiring recession' may be behind us — but the Iran war poses job market risks
cnbc.summary: Hiring activity increased in March, according to federal data issued Tuesday. However, the Iran war threatens to stall that progress in the job market.
